title: Marigold Rings
description: An add-on for Marigolds, adds marigold and cornflower flower rings to your world.
body:
This is an add-on for the mod Marigolds, found [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/marigolds).

Adds flower rings made of cornflowers and marigolds.

The flower rings can be found in these biomes:
- plains
- sunflower plains
- meadow
- flower forest



They're an awesome feature showing how well they pair with the blue cornflower:)
